report.summary: Cycle v18: No new commits this cycle. Stable state — solana-token-extensions 'use client'+metadata regression persists, git locks still present (8+ days), working tree drift at 711 entries. All 6 API routes have correct cache TTLs configured. Egress blocked prevented live endpoint verification.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: TypeScript errors stable at ~42 — all in structured-data.examples.ts (non-critical examples file, JSX syntax in .ts)
Local build: Bus error (core dumped) — VM memory limitation, not a code regression
REGRESSION PERSISTS: /learn/solana-token-extensions-guide-2026 has 'use client' + metadata export conflict — needs server/client split
103 of 466 published slugs still missing page.tsx files (known backlog, no change since v17)
No new pages built or published this cycle — nothing to regression-test

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API routes have properly configured cache TTLs and stale-while-revalidate headers
fear-greed: 10min in-memory / 600s CDN — OK
trending: 5min in-memory / 300s CDN — OK
market-metrics: 60s in-memory / 60s CDN — OK
market-dominance: 5min in-memory / 300s CDN — OK
prices: 60s in-memory / 60s CDN — OK
defi-yields: dynamic cache with stale-while-revalidate — OK
Live endpoint verification blocked by network egress proxy — cannot confirm runtime health
No rate limit hits or fallback triggers detectable from code review (no changes since last cycle)

sections.title: DevOps
items: Vercel project configured (prj_2Hn4Kdtu6fM13sSpxsdnmsJWGI75, org: team_crOFt5ZIDYkZ8TXrZubTK8qj)
No new deployments this cycle — last deploy was Day 62 publish (e999560)
Git locks persist: HEAD.lock and index.lock present for 8+ days — blocking clean git operations
Working tree drift: 711 uncommitted entries (up from 707 in v17)
Local build Bus error is VM memory constraint, not production issue

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Nothing shipped this cycle — no new commits since Day 62 publish
Carry-over: (1) Fix solana-token-extensions 'use client'+metadata conflict, (2) Clean git locks (HEAD.lock, index.lock), (3) Scaffold remaining 103 missing published pages
Working tree drift growing (+4 entries since v17) — needs commit hygiene pass
No blockers requiring immediate Jefe attention — all issues are known carry-overs
